name: tonone-ai
description: Engineering Team - Claude Code agents that work as specialized engineers

engineering-team.description: Install all 13 Engineering Team agents at once

apex-lead.description: Engineering lead — orchestrates the team, scopes work, controls depth and budget

forge-infra.description: Infrastructure engineer — cloud services, networking, IaC, cost optimization

relay-devops.description: DevOps engineer — CI/CD, deployments, GitOps, developer experience

spine-backend.description: Backend engineer — APIs, system design, performance, distributed systems

flux-data.description: Data engineer — databases, migrations, pipelines, data modeling

warden-security.description: Security engineer — IAM, secrets, compliance, threat modeling

vigil-sre.description: Observability & reliability engineer — monitoring, alerting, SRE, incident response, SLOs

prism-frontend.description: Frontend & DX engineer — UI, internal tools, developer portals

cortex-ml.description: ML/AI engineer — model training, MLOps, feature engineering, LLM integration

touch-mobile.description: Mobile engineer — native iOS/Android, cross-platform, app stores, mobile performance

volt-embedded.description: Embedded & IoT engineer — firmware, microcontrollers, edge computing, device protocols

atlas-docs.description: Knowledge engineer — architecture docs, ADRs, API specs, system diagrams, onboarding

lens-analytics.description: Data analytics & BI engineer — dashboards, metrics design, reporting, data storytelling
